covers: cold_neighbors signal + why-line when a git-derived timestamp index is injected (task-spor-cold-neighbors-weight-conformance): task-cold counts 2 newer neighbors (one outbound relate dec-newer-a, one inbound mirror dec-newer-b) and carries 'context moved around it (2 newer neighbors)'; task-warm (older neighbor) and task-equal (equal-instant neighbor, strict-> boundary) carry NO cold_neighbors key. All three tasks share one age, so their scores are EQUAL — locking that cold_neighbors is surfaced-not-scored (0 weight): the signal rides the why-line but never moves the rank
